narrative:
Dover (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,184 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
